series_metadata.series_description: Includes Reports and Action Plans as a result of the monitoring review. Once review is closed, the file will contain all transient records; district self-reports, any district documents sent for review,and any previous review materials on file.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain reports and action plans for five (5) years, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain reports and action plans for five (5) years, then destroy, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
